title: Reported Speech — Statements
description: When you tell someone what another person said, shift tenses back one step.
summary_pt_br: Reported speech: recue um passo no tempo verbal. 'I am tired' → He said he WAS tired.

scenes.subtitle_en: When you tell someone what another person said, shift tenses back one step.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Reported speech: recue um passo no tempo verbal. 'I am tired' → He said he WAS tired.

scenes.text_en: When you tell someone what another person said, shift tenses back one step. Today's focus: reported speech — statements. He said he was tired after the long meeting.
scenes.text_pt: Reported speech: recue um passo no tempo verbal. 'I am tired' → He said he WAS tired. Foco de hoje: reported speech — statements. Ele disse que estava cansado depois da longa reunião.

scenes.title: Reported Speech — Statements
scenes.body_en: Direct: 'I am tired.' → Reported: He said he WAS tired. Rule: present → past, past → past perfect, will → would, can → could.
scenes.body_pt: Reported speech: recue um passo no tempo verbal. 'I am tired' → He said he WAS tired.

examples.en: He said he was tired after the long meeting.
examples.pt: Ele disse que estava cansado depois da longa reunião.

examples.en: She told me she had finished the report already.
examples.pt: Ela me disse que já tinha terminado o relatório.

examples.en: They said they would come back next Monday.
examples.pt: Eles disseram que voltariam na segunda.

exercise.question: Complete: "He said he was tired after the long ___."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "He said he was tired after the long meeting."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Ele disse que estava cansado depois da longa reunião.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
She told me she had finished the report already.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "She told me she had finished the report already."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Ela me disse que já tinha terminado o relatório.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Reported Speech — Statements — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre reported speech — statements. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Did you hear what the boss said in the meeting yesterday?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: No, I missed it. What did he say?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: He said we would launch a new product in October.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Did he mention the deadline for my team?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: He said your team had two weeks to prepare the demo.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: That is tight. Did anyone complain?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Yes, Joca said it was too soon to deliver quality.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: What did the boss reply to him?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: He claimed we had the right resources for the job.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I hope he was right about that.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: We will find out in two weeks. No pressure.

scenes.title: The office announcement
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Write what the boss said in the meeting and how Joca reacted. Include at least two reported sentences.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: On Monday morning, the whole team gathered in the conference room for an urgent announcement.

paragraphs.speaker: Boss
paragraphs.en: I am pleased to announce that we will launch our new product in October.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: Is that deadline too tight for proper testing?

paragraphs.speaker: Boss
paragraphs.en: I said we had enough resources. Trust the process.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: I feel excited but also a little worried about the timeline.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: The meeting ended with more questions than answers, and the team left feeling uncertain.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Reported Speech — Statements". When you tell someone what another person said, shift tenses back one step. He said he was tired after the long meeting. She told me she had finished the report already. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Reported Speech — Statements". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Reported Speech — Statements".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
